# Generated Code Registry

**Purpose**: Identify generated directories, files, and conventions to prevent accidental edits and enable safe regeneration.

**Last Scanned**: 2026-04-06

---

## 🔴 Generated Directory Paths (DO NOT EDIT)

### 1. `.next/` — Next.js Build Output
- **Path**: `dashboard/.next/`
- **Generated By**: `next build` / Turbopack dev server
- **Contains**: Server code, static assets, standalone build, caches, trace files
- **Gitignored**: Yes
- **Regeneration**: Automatic on `npm run build` or dev server start
- **Anti-Pattern**: Never commit `.next/` to git; never hand-edit files in this directory

### 2. `src/generated/prisma/` — Prisma Client
- **Path**: `dashboard/src/generated/prisma/`
- **Generated By**: `prisma generate` (runs in `predev`, `prebuild`, `typecheck`, `pretest`)
- **Contains**: Type-safe database client, models, enums, internal runtime classes
- **Gitignored**: Yes (see `.gitignore` line 44-45: `/src/generated/`)
- **Regeneration**: Run `npm run prisma:generate` after schema changes
- **Anti-Pattern**: Never edit `internal/*` subdirectory; changes are overwritten on regeneration

---

## 📋 Files with Generation Markers

### Prisma Schema (Source of Truth)
- **File**: `dashboard/prisma/schema.prisma`
- **Generator Config** (lines 4-6):
  ```prisma
  generator client {
    provider = "prisma-client"
    output   = "../src/generated/prisma"
  }
  ```
- **Action**: Schema changes → run `npm run prisma:generate`

### Prisma-Generated Client Entry Point
- **File**: `dashboard/src/generated/prisma/client.ts`
- **Marker** (line 2): `/* !!! This is code generated by Prisma. Do not edit directly. !!! */`
- **Other Markers** (lines 3-5):
  - `/* eslint-disable */`
  - `// biome-ignore-all lint: generated file`
  - `// @ts-nocheck`

### Auto-Generated Documentation Blocks

#### Environment Variables
- **File**: `docs/ENV.md`
- **Marker**: Lines 3–23
  ```html
  <!-- AUTO-GENERATED:ENV:START -->
  <!-- AUTO-GENERATED:ENV:END -->
  ```
- **Action**: Edit the generation script, not the content between markers

#### Build Scripts
- **File**: `docs/CONTRIBUTING.md`
- **Marker**: Lines 31–43
  ```html
  <!-- AUTO-GENERATED:SCRIPTS:START -->
  <!-- AUTO-GENERATED:SCRIPTS:END -->
  ```
- **Action**: Update source scripts, then regenerate docs

---

## 🛠 Code Generation Tools in Use

| Tool | Invocation | Output Path | Trigger |
|------|-----------|-------------|---------|
| **Prisma Client** | `npm run prisma:generate` | `dashboard/src/generated/prisma/` | `predev`, `prebuild`, `typecheck`, `pretest` |
| **Next.js Build** | `npm run build` or `next dev` | `dashboard/.next/` | Build & dev server |
| **Docs Generator** | (Custom script, TBD) | `docs/ENV.md`, `docs/CONTRIBUTING.md` | (Manual or CI) |

---

## 📛 Generated File Patterns & Conventions

### Prisma Client Files
```
dashboard/src/generated/prisma/
├── client.ts                    # Main export; marked with "Do not edit"
├── browser.ts                   # Browser-safe subset
├── index.ts                     # Index
├── models.ts                    # Model re-exports
├── enums.ts                     # Generated enums
├── runtime/
├── internal/
│   ├── class.ts                # Prisma internal runtime
│   ├── prismaNamespace.ts      # Type helpers
│   └── prismaNamespaceBrowser.ts
└── models/
    ├── User.ts
    ├── ProviderKeyOwnership.ts
    ├── ModelPreference.ts
    └── ... (one file per table)
```

**Identifier Markers**:
- Comment: `/* !!! This is code generated by Prisma. Do not edit directly. !!! */`
- ESLint: `/* eslint-disable */`
- Biome: `// biome-ignore-all lint: generated file`
- TypeScript: `// @ts-nocheck`

### Next.js Build Files
```
dashboard/.next/
├── server/
├── static/
├── standalone/
├── cache/
├── dev/
├── build/
├── trace
└── *.nft.json
```

**Identifier Markers**:
- Directory names (`server`, `static`, `cache`)
- File extensions (`.nft.json`)
- Presence of Turbopack chunk names

---

## ⚠️ Explicit Anti-Patterns (Documented in Repo)

### From `ANTI_PATTERNS.md` (lines 189–207)
```
GENERATED FILE STABILITY WARNING
- Prisma internal files (`src/generated/prisma/internal/*`) are NOT stable
- Never hand-edit these files; they are regenerated on `prisma generate`
- Breaking changes in Prisma versions may invalidate manual edits
- Always run `prisma generate` after schema changes
```

### From `ANTI_PATTERNS.md` (line 245)
```
❌ Modifying Prisma internals directly
  → Edits wiped on `prisma generate`; schema becomes the source of truth
```

### From `DOMAIN_MAP.md` (lines 338–373)
```
Generated Prisma Domain
- DO NOT EDIT Prisma-generated internals
- Regenerate via: `npm run prisma:generate`
- Schema changes supersede manual edits
```

---

## ✅ Safe Regeneration Workflow

### After Schema Changes
```bash
cd dashboard
npm run prisma:generate    # Regenerate Prisma client
npm run typecheck          # Verify TypeScript (also triggers prisma:generate)
```

### After Build Changes (Next.js)
```bash
cd dashboard
npm run build              # Rebuilds .next/ directory
# OR for dev:
npm run dev                # Turbopack rebuilds .next/ on file changes
```

### After Documentation Structure Changes
```bash
# (If docs generator script exists)
npm run docs:generate      # TBD - exact command depends on tooling
```

---

## 📊 Generation Tool Dependency Map

```
Schema Changes
    ↓
schema.prisma
    ↓ (npm run prisma:generate)
src/generated/prisma/
    ↓
TypeScript compilation
    ↓
Next.js build (.next/)
    ↓
Production bundle
```

---

## 🚫 Files to NEVER Manually Edit

| Path | Reason | Regeneration Command |
|------|--------|----------------------|
| `dashboard/src/generated/prisma/**/*` | Prisma-generated client | `npm run prisma:generate` |
| `dashboard/.next/**/*` | Next.js build output | `npm run build` |
| `docs/ENV.md` (lines 3–23) | Auto-generated from scripts | (Custom generator TBD) |
| `docs/CONTRIBUTING.md` (lines 31–43) | Auto-generated from scripts | (Custom generator TBD) |
| `dashboard/next-env.d.ts` | Next.js type declarations | `next build` / `npm run dev` |

---

## 🔍 How to Recognize Generated Files

### Header Comments
```typescript
// This is code generated by X. Do not edit directly.
// @generated
// AUTO-GENERATED
// GENERATED FILE
```

### ESLint/Linter Directives
```typescript
/* eslint-disable */
// biome-ignore-all lint: generated file
// @ts-nocheck
```

### Directory Names
- `.next/`, `dist/`, `build/`, `out/`
- `src/generated/`
- `__generated__/`

### Git Ignore Patterns
Lines in `.gitignore` that reference build outputs:
- `.next/`
- `out/`
- `build/`
- `dist/`
- `/src/generated/`

---

## 🔗 Related Documentation

- **ANTI_PATTERNS.md** — Explicit anti-patterns, including generated file handling
- **DOMAIN_MAP.md** — Architecture and domain definitions (includes Prisma domain)
- **prisma/schema.prisma** — Source of truth for database structure and client generation

---

## 📝 Checklist for Code Reviews

When reviewing PRs or making edits:

- [ ] No modifications to files in `dashboard/src/generated/prisma/`
- [ ] No modifications to files in `dashboard/.next/`
- [ ] Schema changes always paired with `npm run prisma:generate`
- [ ] No manual edits to auto-generated doc blocks (between marker comments)
- [ ] Build artifacts (.next/, dist/) never committed to git
- [ ] Generated directories in `.gitignore` match actual outputs

---

## 🛠 Maintenance Notes

**If this registry becomes stale**, re-run the generation scan:
```bash
# Scan for new generated directories, markers, and tools
# (See TASK.md for agent-based scanning)
```

**Known Gaps** (May need future investigation):
- Exact docs generation script/tool (ENV.md and CONTRIBUTING.md blocks)
- Potential OpenAPI or GraphQL codegen (not yet detected)
- Third-party tool outputs in `node_modules/` (explicitly excluded from this registry)
